name: thomas-templates
description: Reusable code patterns for Next.js projects. Templates are scaffolds — they show a pattern that you adapt to a concrete entity, rather than installing as-is like a module.

templates.name: transaction-crud-template
templates.description: Pattern for transactional records sharing a shape: line-items as JSON, total amount, payment method, status enum. Adapt per concrete entity (invoice, sales receipt, pickup order, ...).

templates.name: background-job-template
templates.description: Fire-and-forget background-job pattern: in-memory Map<string, Job> store, GET/POST API route (GET = state, POST = start), and a polling button component with idle/working/done/error states.
